enclave.default_greeting: Identify yourself immediately. This is Enclave territory.

idle: The old world will be restored.

rank_greetings.Idolized: Your assistance has been noted. The Enclave remembers its allies.
rank_greetings.Neutral: Identify yourself immediately. This is Enclave territory.
rank_greetings.Vilified: You are a threat to national security. Guards, neutralize this target.

start.text: Identify yourself immediately. This is Enclave territory. You have five seconds to comply.

passing.text: This area is restricted. Leave now, or face detention.

vault.default_greeting: Welcome to the Vault. May you live long.

rank_greetings.Idolized: Our benefactor! The Vault is honored by your presence.
rank_greetings.Neutral: Welcome to the Vault. May you live long.
rank_greetings.Vilified: You are not welcome here. Leave immediately.

start.text: Welcome to the Vault. May you live long and prosper.

about.text: We are Vault 13... I mean, this is our home. A sanctuary from the wasteland.

work.text: The Overseer handles assignments. Check the job board.

supplies.text: The quartermaster handles supplies. Credits or caps accepted.
